description_long: This delivery robot features a cylindrical, weathered metal body with a predominantly orange and green color scheme, accented by industrial markings and the number '05' on its side. It stands on four articulated, mechanical legs with curved, protective orange covers, giving it a stable, insect-like stance suitable for urban terrain. The front is equipped with a vertical array of three circular lights or sensors, and the word 'PILCENT' is stenciled vertically beside them. The rear houses a robust mechanical assembly, including pipes, a coiled spring, and two vertical antennae, suggesting advanced communication or navigation capabilities. The body is segmented with visible panel lines and bolts, and the lower section features additional mechanical details, possibly for locomotion or stabilization. The overall design is rugged and utilitarian, indicating it is built for outdoor, urban delivery tasks.
description: A rugged, orange and green cylindrical delivery robot with four mechanical legs, front sensor lights, and industrial markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three circular sensor lights, 'PILCENT' text, and the number '05' on the left side.
description_view_1: Left-rear angle highlighting the mechanical assembly, pipes, coiled spring, and vertical antennae.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel with two square access covers, antennae, and mechanical components.
description_view_3: Right-rear angle showing the number '5', more of the green paneling, and the side mechanical details.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'PILCENT' is stenciled vertically on the front left side of the body in white, along with the number '05' in large white numerals. No other brand logos or insignia are visible.
attribute_sensor_array: Three circular sensors or lights arranged vertically on the front center of the body, likely functioning as cameras or detection devices.
attribute_compartment_access_panel: A large rectangular access panel is visible on the rear of the body, with two square covers and mechanical hinges, likely for accessing the cargo or delivery compartment.
